name: Amaretto Coffee
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2-cup measure, stir together the warm water and instant coffee crystals.
2. Cook on 100% power for about 4 minutes or until steaming hot, stirring occasionally.
3. Stir in the Amaretto.
4. Serve in mugs.
5. Top each mug of coffee mixture with some dessert topping from a pressurized can.
